verdicts.note: The direction is supported, but -2/high overstates a general objection to overlapping taxes and rising county costs. The dossier documents no specific tax repeal, cut, or categorical opposition to new revenue, so the rubric supports a modest restraint placement.

review_notes: Ann E. Jolie is marked withdrawn and correctly has no scores; the dossier says she is not actively running and supports Solan. No verdict is required for an absent score. Chuck West's sparse pamphlet evidence supports only the two modest placements given.
